title: AIS Metrics Report
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for an aggregated metrics report covering a defined time period. Produced by the metrics-collector skill and consumed by the finops-agent and governance explorer website.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this report was generated.

period_start.description: ISO 8601 date-time for the inclusive start of the reporting period.

period_end.description: ISO 8601 date-time for the inclusive end of the reporting period.

total_events.description: Total number of audit events processed in the reporting period.

events_by_agent.description: Map of agent name (kebab-case) to event count for the period.

events_by_step.description: Map of AIS Specify step to event count.

events_by_autonomy.description: Map of autonomy level to event count.

events_by_outcome.description: Map of outcome to event count.

avg_duration_by_activity.description: Map of activity name to average duration in seconds across all events in the period.

manual_to_governed_ratio.description: Tracks the ratio of manually performed activities to governance-logged activities, showing framework adoption momentum.

manual_count.description: Number of activities performed without a governance audit event.

governed_count.description: Number of activities that produced a governance audit event.

maturity_scores.description: Time series of framework readiness/maturity assessment scores, one entry per assessment date.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the maturity assessment.

score.description: Maturity score from 0 (not started) to 100 (fully adopted).

framework_adoption.description: Summary of framework component adoption across the repository.

total_components.description: Total number of framework components tracked.

adopted_components.description: Number of components that have been adopted.

breakdown.description: Per-category adoption breakdown. Keys are category names.

top_agents_by_usage.description: Ranked list of agents by activity volume in the period.

count.description: Number of events emitted by this agent in the period.

pct.description: Percentage of total events attributable to this agent.

governance_health.description: Health summary of the governance registry: how many entries are current, due soon, or overdue.

total_registry_entries.description: Total number of governance registry entries.

overdue_count.description: Number of entries whose review_due_at is in the past.

due_soon_count.description: Number of entries whose review_due_at is within 30 days from today.

healthy_count.description: Number of entries that are current (review_due_at is more than 30 days away).
